title: Shared/Public Particle Rendering
summary: Room admins can now set ambient particle effects (sparkle, snow, bubble, firefly, dust) in Room Settings. The effects are stored in the room appearance file and shown to all users when they enter the room.

changes.description: After applying colour overrides, destroys previous room_ambient_{room} particle key and respawns a new canvas on #messages if a.ambientParticles is set and type != 'none'.
Replaced manual particle canvas loop with _destroyParticlesForKey('room_ambient_' + room) for clean ambient particle teardown on room leave.
Added Ambient Particles row to the Room Visual Theme section: type picker buttons (none/sparkle/snow/bubble/firefly/dust), colour input, and count slider.
Save handler now builds ambientParticles config from rsbAmbientGrid, rsbAmbientColor, rsbAmbientCount and includes it in the _updatedRa object saved to roomAppearancePath.
